Text: Select up to 2 additional actions. These can only be used in PvP areas.
Select the PvP role action you wish to use. Only one of these actions can be used per role, and they are applicable only in large-scale PvP duties (Frontline and Rival Wings).
Adjustments made via the slider are only visible on your screen until you have confirmed the new setting.
Adjustments are only visible on your screen until you have confirmed the new settings.
List of basic actions used in combat.
List of actions that can be assigned to the hotbar.
Elemental EXP can only be earned in applicable areas.
Obtainable elemental EXP is displayed in applicable areas.

<If(Equal(IntegerParameter(1),2))>　　　　　　　　　　<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Data Center Travel System<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
The Data Center Travel system is an extension of the World Visit system, and allows you to temporarily visit Worlds in other data centers. Certain restrictions apply to data center travel, including those dictated by the World Visit system.

　　　　　　　　　　<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Visiting Other Data Centers<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Until you have returned from visiting another data center, you may not log in or perform other actions with characters in your Home World.
　・You may only travel to other data centers from your Home World. If you wish to travel to a data center different from the one you are currently visiting, you must first return to your Home World and submit a Data Center Visit request from there.
　・When logging out from another World, you will automatically be returned to your Home World if you do not log in again within 30 days. Depending on the timing of your last logout, you may be returned after more than 30 days have passed.

<Else/></If><If(LessThan(IntegerParameter(1),2))>　　　　　　　　　　<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>World Visit System<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
The World Visit System allows you to travel from <If(Equal(IntegerParameter(1),0))>your Home World<Else/>the World you are currently visiting</If> to different World servers within the same data center. While visiting different Worlds, you may party with friends, purchase items, tackle duties, and more.

　　　　　　　　　　<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Visiting Other Worlds<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Depending on the congestion of the target World, travel may take several minutes.
　・Once preparations have been completed, travel will occur automatically and cancel all current actions/duties.
　・When logging out from another World, you will automatically be returned to your Home World if you do not log in again within 30 days. Depending on the timing of your last logout, you may be returned after more than 30 days have passed.

<Else/></If>　　　　　　　　　<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Restrictions While Visiting <If(GreaterThan(IntegerParameter(1),0))>Other Data Centers<Else/>Other Worlds</If><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
<If(Equal(IntegerParameter(1),1))>You are currently outside your Home Data Center. <Else/></If>The following restrictions apply when playing <If(GreaterThan(IntegerParameter(1),0))>in another data center<Else/>on other World servers</If>:

<If(GreaterThan(IntegerParameter(1),0))><UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Friend List<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Friends in different data centers cannot communicate
　・Parties cannot be formed with friends in different data centers
　・Login details for friends in different regions cannot be displayed

<Else/></If><UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Free Companies<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Free companies cannot be formed or joined
　・Free company information cannot be viewed
　・Company credits cannot be earned
　・Should the company master spend 35 consecutive days away from their Home World, their rank will be automatically transferred to another member
　・Login details for members in different regions cannot be displayed

<If(GreaterThan(IntegerParameter(1),0))><UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Cross-world Linkshells<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Cross-world linkshells cannot be created
　・Cross-world linkshell master privileges cannot be attained

<Else/></If><UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Linkshells<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Linkshells cannot be used
　・Linkshell information cannot be viewed
　・Linkshells cannot be created or joined

<If(GreaterThan(IntegerParameter(1),0))><UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>PvP Teams<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・PvP teams cannot be used
　・PvP team information cannot be viewed
　・PvP teams cannot be created or joined

<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Fellowships<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・All functions for fellowships, excluding recruitment search, are inaccessible

<Else/></If><UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Retainers<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Retainers cannot be summoned, hired, or released from service
　・Items cannot be put up to market (but can be purchased)

<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Housing<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Land and apartments cannot be purchased
　・Residence sharing is unavailable

<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Eternal Bonding<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
　・Ceremonies of Eternal Bonding are unavailable
　・Eternal Bonding quests are unavailable
　・Others' ceremonies cannot be attended

<UIForeground>F20202</UIForeground>Duties/Features<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
<If(Equal(IntegerParameter(1),2))>　・Crystalline Conflict ranked matches can be entered if:
　　・Your Home World is in the same physical data center
　　・You participate via the hosting data center
<Else/></If>　・Lord of Verminion tournaments cannot be entered
　・Triple Triad tournaments cannot be entered
　・Cactpot tickets cannot be purchased
　・The Moogle Delivery Service is unavailable
　・Deep Dungeon results will not be saved to the leaderboards
　・Friendship circlet and eternal bonding teleportation is
　　available only if both parties are on the same World
　・Legendary and unspoiled gathering nodes are inaccessible
